title: n8n-io/n8n
summary: n8n 是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生 AI 能力。它结合了可视化构建和自定义代码，支持自托管或云部署，拥有超过 400 个集成。该项目在 GitHub 上获得了 197430 颗星，涵盖 AI、API、自动化、低代码/无代码、MCP 客户端/服务器等主题，是构建 AI 代理和工作流自动化的强大工具。
summary_en: n8n is a fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. It combines visual building with custom code, supports self-hosting or cloud deployment, and offers over 400 integrations. With 197430 stars on GitHub, it covers topics like AI, APIs, automation, low-code/no-code, MCP client/server, making it a powerful tool for building AI agents and workflow automation.
